prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-65PCDIECASTCARSET-CONSTRUCTION Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 65pc Construction Toys Diecast Cars Playset for Boys, Ages 3 and Up Description: Let the building begin with this awesome and action packed 65pc Construction Toys Diecast Cars Playset from Kidplokio! Perfect for young construction enthusiasts, this set features a variety of realistic diecast vehicles designed to bring the world of construction to life. From digging and lifting, to hauling and demolishing, your little builder will have everything they need to run their very own busy construction site.

From excavators and cranes, to dump trucks and other construction site accessories, toddlers can dig into playtime right away (no assembly required).

Hours of imaginative play, hand eye coordination and dexterity development and creativity await, as kids set up and operate their very own construction site. And, sparking curiosity about construction, engineering and other related fields, kids will love using their imagination to conjure up adventurous pretend play sessions, while the playset encourages them to participate in screen free playtime with friends and family.

Built tough for endless playtime, these construction themed diecast cars, trucks and accessories are sturdy,safe and ideal for active play. Designed with little hands in mind, this diecast cars playset is suitable for children ages three and up. Ready, set, build! Search Terms: Construction toys stem toddler tactile sensory fine motor skills diecast cars gifts for boys birthday presents stocking stuffers race car games pretend play toy vehicle playsets car accessories screen free activities for toddlers dump truck toy Features: - 65PC CONSTRUCTION TOYS DIECAST CARS PLAYSET: Let the building begin with this awesome construction themed diecast cars playset! This playset set features a variety of realistic diecast vehicles designed to bring the world of construction to life and, with no assembly required, little builders can dig into playtime right away - CONSTRUCTION TOYS: This captivating set includes 65 diecast cars and accessories, each designed with vibrant, construction inspired graphics! This playset includes dump truck toys, cranes, bulldozers, construction site accessories and so much more - DURABLE AND SAFE: Built tough for endless playtime, these construction themed diecast cars and accessories are sturdy, safe and ideal for active play; designed with little hands in mind, this diecast cars playset is suitable for children ages three and up - TACTILE TOYS: From digging and lifting, to hauling and demolishing, your little builder will have everything they need to run their own busy construction site with this hands on diecast car playset; sparking curiosity about construction, engineering and other related fields, kids will love using their imagination and encourages them to participate in screen free playtime with friends and family - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 18 x 14.5 x 2 inches; Weight: 1.62lbs; Note: No Assembly Required === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Dump Trucks, Cranes, Bulldozers, Ages 3 Plus, No Assembly, Screen-Free Play, Fine Motor Skills

openai.title_differentiation: 65 Piece Construction Site Vehicles, No Assembly Required, Durable Diecast, Screen Free Pretend Play, Ages 3 And Up
